description: If you're a QA, automation engineer, or developer looking to run automated tests on your site, HeadSpin is the right solution for you. I have tried a few other tools and by far this one is the most user-friendly, reliable and quick of all. Literally, in two clicks, you can go from signing up to running your first test!
author: James I.
pros: Using Headspin has been a great way to reduce the amount of time it takes to test across various browsers and platforms. I can run tests on 5-10 browsers simultaneously, which saves me a lot of time because I don't have to toggle windows between each browser.
cons: I think HeadSpin is a very solid product. I haven't encountered any problems with it in my testing and everything worked smoothly.

author: Bronte H.
pros: Remote access to multiple mobile / tablet devices in China
cons: Remote access is slow and at times freezes up.

author: Barun K.
pros: we will learn then will discussed will ur leaders.
cons: feature is good , kindly provide access for POC
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: HeadSpin Cross Browser Testing tool is a must.
description: We have been using Headspin for a while now and we are very happy with it. We have found the service to be very helpful in solving cross-browser-related issues. We can test our projects locally and do not have to worry about sending them to remote servers. The service is also very easy to use!
author: Dina D.
pros: We have been using HeadSpin for a while now, and we're pleased with their services. Their customer support is available 24x7 and they have helped us many times with any issues or questions we had. They are always up to date with the latest version of browsers, which is something we highly value. They have a wide selection of browsers and operating systems, which makes it easy for us to identify tthe issue on our websiteand solve it in no time.
cons: No, there's nothing to complain about. Small issues you can always find in any tool.

description: Great experience and great functionality for us to be able to offer it to our customers.
author: Arantxazu D.
pros: It's super friendly user and it gives you all the visibility that you might need to see how your apps and websited are performing and if your user experience is beeing negatively impacted
cons: It is only in English, no other languages can be used. So if your team does not speak English, it might be an inconvenience.

review_title: Seamless performance kpi capture for mobile platforms
description: Time to market, user mobile experience in production was improved drastically.
author: Kavyashree A.
pros: Ui is very intuitive to showcase all the issues pallets which is like the war room analysis- where u have everything to find the bottleneck.
cons: Frequent device software updates without the notification

review_title: Best mobile KPI capture in the market
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Profiling sessions, waterfall view, issue pallets
cons: Frequent updates on devices often results in device unavailability.

description: its a really good experience using this platform , really satisfied
author: Ahsan M.
pros: help to assure my hybrid bundles. help me for my financial service app testing give me best insights of my network performance give me best testing of my mobile phones performance in different application
cons: reporting dashboard is missing which can give me the reports of my test cases
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great place for anyone looking to look how to use Appium
description: Our group was looking to research, then implement, automated testing for the mobile product we develop. This site is still helping us transition from all manual testing to automation. It provided a very easy and took a very intimidating subject and broke it down to sections and pieces that are easy to understand and move forward with. Not just that, but now I also got to look around and the different programs and languages available to use with Appium and that helps decide which we end up using.
author: Georgina C.
pros: Regardless of what you use Appium with, there's something here for you. This is how I'm learning to programmatically control our testing, something new to me and to our company.
cons: I'm not sure that there is anything missing from HeadSpin. There are more courses than I can use, the ones I do use are clear, easy to follow, and I get to practice on our actual devices. I never had cause to use support, so there's nothing I can say about that either. Great work, keep it up!

description: The overall feature set of Headspin is good and simplifies the overall testing of mobile applications.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: HeadSpin allows us to test the performance of our mobile applications automatically from remotely from anywhere using any device.
cons: the product could be more affordable and value for money.

author: Alexander M.
pros: I needed to simulate an iOS device. Didn't want to use my personal phone. Made it easy to uncover a bug while not having to leave my browser or even reach for my pocket.
cons: Pricing, if I only need to test a few scenarios a month, I wish there was a more affordable plan than $30 per month. Even if the time I could use on an iOS device was quite lmited.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Of the device farms I used, Amazon and Samsung, HeadSpin is the best choice. It allows me to run test scrips that require SMS which is a no no on Samsung devices.
author: Vanita W.
pros: It is easy to install apps on the HeadSpin devices and run Appium test. Test scripts run fast on both iOS and Android. The interface is easy to understand. The recording of the test run is easy to understand and gives detail information on which step of the test script were executed.
cons: There is sometimes an issue with the device becoming available after stopping a test script before it is complete. After the test scripts execute completely, the device becomes available for all to use. It would be nice for me to 'checkout' the device for my entire session.

author: Ashok K.
pros: 1. Easy of Deployment 2. Rich APIs 3. AI-based Issue detection Engine. 4. Issue/Suggestions Cards 5. Host/Domain based metrics 6. Detailed HTTP Traffic Metrics 7. Video MOS and KPIs 8. Dashboard/Grafana
cons: Device reservations. The only API-based locking is available, looking forward to UI-based reservation feature.

review_title: Best Cloud platform for everything you need
description: Overall its very good and very productive for us.
author: Vidyasagar P.
pros: Parallel execution, Performance capture, video recording, audio test automation, ease of accessing the devices.
cons: some times dashboards takes time to load.

author: Tagir F.
pros: Real devices and nice dashboard help with automation
cons: Complicated setup, sometimes device can be off. api not working all the time. DB questions Nimbleapp should support Android 9 - 11 asap

description: We are using this to test mobile sdk and this product lets us test in both platform with ease
author: Sarada V.
pros: This product was easy to use and most of all it helped us to test without interruption during pandemic.
cons: I wish we could track the network calls with ease.

author: Igor P.
pros: I was able to find a unique course for XCUITest that I didn't see anywhere else.
cons: 1) I waited for about 2 months when XCUITest will be available. The course was with a note as Coming Soon. After 2 months I used the option to ask questions about this course and got a reply after one week. I got the option to be a beta tester for this course, which gave me immediate access to the course. 2) The last module of the same course was with the same note as Coming Soon. Now I am waiting for another ~2 months last module to be open. The last module has important information such as run XCUITests on real devices or integration with Jenkins.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Srinath K.
pros: Product capability and ease of use. Customer service is excellent
cons: Slightly on higher side about price. Should have easier way to lease physical devices as well on prem

author: Deleep N.
pros: any device , any network, simple to use , easy to plugin
cons: Pricing , user manual , knlowledgebase , turn around time

author: Bipul J.
pros: Deployment is easy and on demand any device can be setup
cons: Very slow sometimes. Hence testing is difficult

author: Romesh S.
pros: Connected intelligence, analytics and ease of integration makes it easy to use.
cons: User interface and user experience can be improved.

description: It was nice and will be a drastic change in near future

cons: Not much famous among market and less people know about it

pros: Ease of use Large number of devices Reuse devices from pool

author: Chandra S.
pros: Automation features, actions, integrated functional and performance testing
cons: P-Box flexibility, price and customer support can be better
